title: Sensualita
writer: Ennio De Concini, Clemente Fracassi, Alberto Moravia
actors: Marcello Mastroianni, Eleonora Rossi Drago, Amedeo Nazzari
plot: The shortened USA running time for "Sensualita", (which, by the way, was not financed nor produced by Paramount Pictures, although some source seems to think so) is because most of the sweating-in-the-stables and toil-in-the-soil ...
